records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
306
§306
(306) uhari suto madhu pritamo satalakhā sṃ 
yaśodhara ddāu/…hariama sṃ gṃgārāma ddāu/ 
madhusuto uṃmāika: khāuāla sṃ raghupati suta 
lakṣmīkānta dāu…budhavāla sṃ dāmodara ddāu/ umāī 
sutā vṃśīdhara rudī dharmadattā: khāuāla sṃ 
mahīsuta dayārāma dāu pabāuli sṃ paduma ddāu/ 
vṃśīdhara suto bhāilāla: pālī sṃ medhākara suta 
keśava dāu (B. 37) dariharā sṃ veṇī ddāu/ bhāilāla sutā 
khaṇḍabalā sṃ uṃmāpati suta ṭekana dāu…ekaharā 
sṃ nehāla ddāu/ (305) yānū pra. yanārdana suto 
muralī ve. hemanātho pālī sṃ rāma suta 
pradyumnanātha dāu…sakarāḍʰaī sṃ rāmadeva ddāu/ 
muralī suto śivadatta bhavānīdatto māṇḍara sṃ 
purandara suta gonū dāu…khaṇḍabalā sṃ ghāru ddāu/ 
śivadatta suta ḍomana: ghusāuta sṃ theghu suta 
yānakī nātha dāu…dariharā sṃ kulānanda ddāu/ 
ḍomana suto dāmodara: valiyāsa sṃ cilakā suta 
kalānātha dāu (B 61//6)kara. kiśāurī ddāu/ dāmodara 
suto maheśvara parameśvaro satalakhā sṃ rudī suta 
raghunātha dāu hemanātha suto baccāka: vṛdhavāla 
sṃ lakṣmana suta dinabandhu dāu velauṃca sṃ 
govinda ddāu/ baccā sutā…vudhavāla sṃ narapati suta 
rudrapati dāu…ekaharā sṃ aniruddha ddāu/

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
IAST ARCHIVE — D_7_Notes
Term / Field
Explanation
BATCH 1
Source
VOL_II.docx — Prachin Pañjī (prācīna pañjī)
Structure
Running genealogical prose organised by 
village/lineage labels. No numbered sections. Each 
paragraph = one or more ancestor chains in 
continuous IPA prose.
Para range
Para 1–384
Entry_ID range
02-00001 to 02-02576
Marriage records
2576 in this batch
SCHEMA
1_Marriage_Records
Entry_ID · Para_No · Location_Label · Ancestor · 
Ancestor_Prefix · Bride_Village · Bride_Father · Bride · 
Verb · Marriage_Type · Incomplete_Flag
2_Lineage_Records
One row per (para, ancestor) chain: Para_No · Location 
· Ancestor · Marriage_Count · Para_Text_IAST (full IAST-
converted paragraph text)
3_Name_Index
All ancestors sorted by marriage count; title 
annotations
4_Village_Index
Bride-villages ranked by frequency
5_Honorifics_Titles
Titled persons: m.m.u., maho., jyo., vāiyākaraṇa, 
ācārya, adhyāpaka, rājā, etc.
6_Sections_Summary
Per-paragraph: location label, 
total/complete/incomplete marriage counts
7_Notes
Schema key and batch metadata
NOTE ON COMPLETENESS
Marriage_Type primary = with Bride_Father suta Bride 
pattern; secondary = Bride only (village sṃ Bride dāu). 
Incomplete_Flag Y = village or bride is ellipsis/missing 
in original IPA. Ancestor extraction is best-effort from 
running prose — field contains the name appearing in 
the suta construction nearest to each record.
ACTION VERB
dāu = dattā (bride given); du dāu = secondary dāu 
(second wife/alliance)
IAST
ISO 15919
Header fill
#1F3864 white bold Arial 11pt

running prose — field contains the name appearing in 
the suta construction nearest to each record.

(second wife/alliance)
